reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar, servicio.
Las chicas muy amables los chicos muy serviciales en todo.momento.
Buenos precios y mejor los sándwich de pollo que hacen ...
Excelente, altamente recomendable...
Saludos hasta la.próxima

Excellent place and service.
The girls were very friendly, and the guys were very helpful at all times.
Good prices, and the chicken sandwiches are even better... Excellent, highly recommended... Until next time!
